summary: Iteration 20 - Mode Lecture (Reading Mode) Feature Testing. All features tested and working correctly: backend transcript APIs, frontend TranscriptReader component, 'Lire' button visibility logic.

issues: Console warnings about deprecated 'shadow*' style props - should use 'boxShadow'
Console warnings about invalid 'background' style property - should use long-form properties

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: TranscriptReader.tsx line 331 uses backdropFilter which may have limited browser support
Minor: Several console warnings about deprecated style props (shadow*, background) - cosmetic but should be cleaned up
seed_data_creation: Using existing transcript data for aud_cours-traduction-mod-1
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mode Lecture feature fully implemented and tested. TranscriptReader component renders markdown content from docx-converted transcripts. The 'Lire' button only appears for audios with has_transcript: true. Font size adjustment works (A+/A-). Close button returns to audio player.

login_api.details: Login with loubniz@hotmail.com / loulouz returns token

audio_list_api.details: Returns audios with has_transcript field, first audio (aud_cours-traduction-mod-1) has has_transcript: true

transcript_api_with_content.details: Returns has_transcript: true, title, content (16703 chars), word_count (2386), reading_time_minutes (12)

transcript_api_without_content.details: Returns has_transcript: false for audio without transcript

audio_player_lire_button_visible.details: 'Lire' button (data-testid='audio-read-btn') visible for audio with transcript

transcript_reader_opens.details: TranscriptReader opens with 'Mode Lecture' header, reading time (12 min), word count (2,386 mots), markdown content

transcript_reader_font_controls.details: Font size increases when A+ clicked

transcript_reader_floating_player.details: Play button and progress bar visible at bottom of TranscriptReader

transcript_reader_close.details: Headset icon in header closes TranscriptReader and returns to audio player

audio_without_transcript_no_lire_button.details: 'Lire' button correctly NOT visible for audio without transcript
